title: Luxante Coins
description: Datapack for roleplay servers that adds unobtainable coins and banker villager who can be summoned by command
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a1f08006af0014c2be2b9b2c9b31bb88b60368d.png)
## This datapack was ordered by [Vincery](https://taplink.cc/vincery) for his roleplay server. Found bug / order datapack / other - [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCWyMsE94D).

### This datapack was intended to add currency to the server.

The admins gave someone coins that could be exchanged in the equivalent of 1 to 4 (silver -> copper, etc.) with the banker villager but only platinum coins are worth 16 gold. The banker's coin exchange works both ways.

Only 1 banker per world is supported

### Resource pack in datapack version! Don't forget to download it (Optifine not required)

## Coins:
![Coins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b9741b753bd8220844400312ed4e9ed89edbda4.png)

## Banker:
![Banker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07ec369c1d93e676f4c03d50c55c38678c6ad29e.png)


<details>
<summary>How to use the Banker</summary>

To interact with the Banker, throw him one type of coin, then RMB on it, select an action and click on [ + ]

</details>


Commands to give yourself coins:
```
/function erkatom:coins/copper
/function erkatom:coins/silver
/function erkatom:coins/gold
/function erkatom:coins/platinum
```
Command to give yourself banker spawn egg:
```
/function erkatom:npc/get_egg
```
